data.title: Bitcoin Weekend Pump to $85K: Is the Rally Real or a Trap?
data.description:
Bitcoin's weekend pump hits $84K but analysts warn of 'pump-and-dump' pattern repeating for sixth straight week.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bitcoin-weekend-pump-to-85k-is-the-rally-real-or-a-trap/

data.title: Arthur Hayes Forecasts Bitcoin Boom Amid US Tariff Policies
data.description:
Arthur Hayes, co-founder of BitMEX, has projected a significant increase in the value of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). This anticipated surge is linked to the tariff policies of President Donald Trump. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44778543/arthur-hayes-forecasts-bitcoin-boom-amid-us-tariff-policies?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: XRP Price To Hit $45? Here’s What Happens If It Mimics 2017 And 2021 Rallies
data.description:
XRP has staged an impressive recovery to reclaim the $2 price level after plunging to a weekly low of $1. 657 in a steep midweek correction. The rebound comes at a crucial time for the cryptocurrency, with analysts paying closer attention to historical price behaviors and bullish technical patterns. Among them is EGRAG CRYPTO, a popular XRP analyst on X, who believes that the cryptocurrency could be on the cusp of a monumental surge reminiscent of its previous bull cycles in 2017 and 2021
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-to-hit-45/

data.title: Goldman Sachs Retracts Recession Call After Trump Tariff Pause
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 12, 2025- Goldman Sachs economists withdrew a recession prediction Wednesday just over an hour after issuing it, following President Donald Trump announced a pause of new tariffs on multiple countries. The initial forecast, released shortly before 1 p. m. , projected a 65% chance of recession within the next 12 months, citing country-specific tariffs […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/goldman-sachs-retracts-recession-call-after-trump-tariff-pause

data.title: Trump to Implement Tariffs on Critical Tech Imports
data.description:
President Donald Trump announces tariffs on imports like semiconductors to reduce U. S. dependency on foreign nations. The tariffs aim to bolster domestic production and national security.
source: https://coincu.com/331769-trump-tariffs-critical-tech

data.title: Taiwan authorities sue Steaker platform for unauthorized crypto investment scheme
data.description:
Taiwan authorities have initiated legal actions against Steaker for running an unauthorized crypto investment scheme. According to reports, authorities charged the founder, Huang Weixuan, alongside other executives for their part in the investment scheme. According to the authorities, the quartet were involved in allegedly using the Steaker platform to raise about $45. 8 billion through unauthorized […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/taiwan-sue-steaker-for-crypto-scheme/

data.title: SEC and Binance Request Court to Extend Lawsuit Pause Again
data.description:
The SEC and Binance have requested a 60-day pause in their lawsuit, marking another extension for productive discussions.
source: https://coincu.com/331767-sec-binance-lawsuit-60-day-pause

data.title: Institutions Possibly Disposing Solana, Time to Sell?
data.description:
Solana (SOL) recently saw the unlocking of a massive amount of tokens from FTX/Alameda, raising doubt about the market performance despite recent price hike. In particular, FTX/Alameda unlocked 186,326 SOL tokens, or about $21,500,000. This could cause some investors to think about selling their holdings as the market reacts
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/12/institutions-possibly-disposing-of-solana-time-to-sell/

data.title: Trump exempts select tech products from tariffs, crypto to benefit?
data.description:
United States President Donald Trump has exempted an array of tech products including, smartphones, chips, computers, and select electronics from tariffs, giving the tech industry a much-needed respite from trade pressures. According to the US Customs and Border Protection, storage cards, modems, diodes, semiconductors, and other electronics were also excluded from the ongoing trade tariffs. "Large-cap technology companies will ultimately come out ahead when this is all said and done," The Kobeissi letter wrote in an April 12 X post. US Customs and Border Protection announces tariff exemptions on select tech products
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-exempts-select-tech-products-tariffs-crypto-benefit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: New York Lawmaker Introduces Bill That Would Allow State Agencies To Accept Crypto Payments
data.description:
A new bill working its way through New York’s legislature would allow residents to pay state agencies with crypto. New York State Assemblyman Clyde Vanel (D-Queens) introduced Assembly Bill A7788 on Thursday, and the potential legislation was referred to the Standing Committee on Governmental Operations.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/12/new-york-lawmaker-introduces-bill-that-would-allow-state-agencies-to-accept-crypto-payments/
